options.content:
## GatewayZ — System Quality Dashboard
8-pillar health view for the AI Inference Gateway. Each pillar maps to a distinct system quality attribute with live SLI/SLO signals.

| Pillar | Signal | Target |
|--------|--------|--------|
| 🛡️ **Reliability** | 5xx Error Rate · SLO Compliance | < 0.5% errors · 99.9% availability |
| ⚡ **Performance** | P95 Latency · Throughput | P95 < 3s · baseline ± 2× |
| 📈 **Scalability** | Concurrency · Cache Hit Rate | > 60% cache · no connection exhaustion |
| ✅ **Availability** | Provider Health · Circuit Breakers | All providers green |
| 🔭 **Observability** | Log Rate · Exception Tracking | < 10 critical errors/min |
| 🔄 **Fault Tolerance** | Circuit Breaker State · Retry Rate | < 5% velocity-mode activations |
| 🔒 **Security** | Auth Failures · Rate Limit Hits | < 1% 429 rate |
| 🔧 **Maintainability** | Memory · Redis Ops · Process Health | RSS < 1GB · Redis hit > 60% |

_Metrics from Prometheus/Mimir · Logs from Loki · Navigate: [Four Golden Signals](#) for SRE deep-dive · [Distributed Tracing](#) for trace analytics_

panels.title: 🛡️  Reliability — SLO Compliance · Error Rate · Exception Tracking
SLO Compliance Over Time (% Successful Requests)
Latency Percentiles Over Time (P50 / P95 / P99)
✅  Availability — Provider Health · Circuit Breakers · Success Rate
Exception Rate Over Time by Type
Log Volume by Level (INFO / WARNING / ERROR)
🔄  Fault Tolerance — Circuit Breakers · Velocity Mode · OTEL Pipeline
🔒  Security — Auth Failures · Rate Limits · Velocity Mode
Rate Limit Rejections Over Time by Endpoint
Redis Memory & Eviction Rate Over Time
